mapper.select:
SELECT ian.ian_no , ian.ian_owr_id , ian.ian_send_stts_cd , ian.ian_send_dt , ian.ian_regist_dt , ian.ian_curr_loc , ian.ian_arrv_status_cd , ian.ian_trc_no , ian.ian_arrv_dt
, CASE ian.ian_send_stts_cd WHEN 'TRC_NTC_NSENT' THEN '발송대기' WHEN 'TRC_NTC_SENT' THEN '발송완료' ELSE NVL(ian.ian_send_stts_cd, '-') END AS send_stts_nm
, CASE ian.ian_arrv_status_cd WHEN 'TRC_ARR_IN_TRANSIT' THEN '운송중' WHEN 'TRC_ARR_DELAYED' THEN '지연' WHEN 'TRC_ARR_PENDING' THEN '도착대기' WHEN 'TRC_ARR_ARRIVED' THEN '도착' ELSE NVL(ian.ian_arrv_status_cd, '-') END AS arrv_status_nm
FROM imp_arrv_ntc ian
ORDER BY ian.ian_no DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL , COUNT(CASE WHEN ian.ian_send_stts_cd = 'TRC_NTC_NSENT' THEN 1 END) AS PENDING , COUNT(CASE WHEN ian.ian_send_stts_cd = 'TRC_NTC_SENT' THEN 1 END) AS SENT FROM imp_arrv_ntc ian WHERE ian.ian_owr_id = #{owrId}

SELECT ian.ian_no , ian.ian_owr_id , ian.ian_send_stts_cd , ian.ian_send_dt , ian.ian_regist_dt , ian.ian_curr_loc , ian.ian_arrv_status_cd , ian.ian_trc_no , ian.ian_arrv_dt
, CASE ian.ian_send_stts_cd WHEN 'TRC_NTC_NSENT' THEN '발송대기' WHEN 'TRC_NTC_SENT' THEN '발송완료' ELSE NVL(ian.ian_send_stts_cd, '-') END AS send_stts_nm
, CASE ian.ian_arrv_status_cd WHEN 'TRC_ARR_IN_TRANSIT' THEN '운송중' WHEN 'TRC_ARR_DELAYED' THEN '지연' WHEN 'TRC_ARR_PENDING' THEN '도착대기' WHEN 'TRC_ARR_ARRIVED' THEN '도착' ELSE NVL(ian.ian_arrv_status_cd, '-') END AS arrv_status_nm
FROM imp_arrv_ntc ian WHERE ian.ian_no = #{ianNo} AND ian.ian_owr_id = #{owrId}

SELECT ian_no AS ianNo , ian_owr_id AS ianOwrId , ian_send_stts_cd AS ianSendSttsCd , ian_send_dt AS ianSendDt , ian_regist_dt AS ianRegistDt , ian_curr_loc AS ianCurrLoc , ian_arrv_status_cd AS ianArrvStatusCd , ian_trc_no AS ianTrcNo , ian_arrv_dt AS ianArrvDt , CASE ian_send_stts_cd WHEN 'TRC_NTC_NSENT' THEN '발송대기' WHEN 'TRC_NTC_SENT' THEN '발송완료' ELSE NVL(ian_send_stts_cd, '-') END AS sendSttsNm , CASE ian_arrv_status_cd WHEN 'TRC_ARR_IN_TRANSIT' THEN '운송중' WHEN 'TRC_ARR_DELAYED' THEN '지연' WHEN 'TRC_ARR_PENDING' THEN '도착대기' WHEN 'TRC_ARR_ARRIVED' THEN '도착' ELSE NVL(ian_arrv_status_cd, '-') END AS arrvStatusNm FROM imp_arrv_ntc WHERE ian_trc_no = #{trcNo} AND ian_owr_id = #{owrId}
